pages.text: The Storage Terminal is the direct item interface. Its grid grows with the window and scrolls when the network has more visible types than fit.
See $(l:magic_storage:recipes)Recipe Catalog$() for the exact crafting layout.

Left-click a network item to take a stack, right-click to take half, and Shift-click to move a stack to your inventory. Scroll the grid or drag its bar to browse. Shift-click an inventory stack to insert it into the network.

The search field matches names by default. Switch search mode for #tag or @mod queries. Hover a result for its exact stored amount and full details; compact numbers in the grid never replace the exact tooltip value.

Sort by Name, Quantity, Mod, or ID and choose ascending or descending order. Variants with different properties stay separate. For recipes and the Fuel page, upgrade to the $(l:magic_storage:crafting_terminal)Crafting Terminal$().
